query:
SELECT p.id, p.name FROM programs p WHERE p.user_id = 1;
SELECT pe.id, pe.session_label, pe.exercise_name, pe.sets FROM program_exercises pe JOIN programs p ON pe.program_id = p.id WHERE p.user_id = 1 LIMIT 5;
